tools.name: movscript.get_context_pack
tools.description: Return current MovScript UI route, selected project, current user, selected entity, available project resources, and local draft count. Use this before project-specific work.

tools.name: movscript.search_entities
tools.description: Search scripts, settings, assets, episodes, scenes, storyboards, and shots in the current or specified project. Use when the user names content without an exact entity ID.

tools.name: movscript.read_entity
tools.description: Read a single MovScript project entity by entityType and entityId. Supported entityType values are project, script, setting, asset, episode, scene, storyboard, and shot.

tools.name: movscript.read_project_structure
tools.description: Read compact project structure across scripts, settings, episodes, scenes, storyboards, shots, and pipeline nodes.

tools.name: movscript.create_draft
tools.description: Create a local draft artifact for proposed scripts, settings, storyboards, shots, prompts, or notes. This does not write formal project entities.

tools.name: movscript.list_drafts
tools.description: List local draft artifacts for the current or specified project. Use to review previous agent proposals.

tools.name: movscript.open_entity
tools.description: Navigate the MovScript UI to an entity page such as scripts, assets, scenes, storyboards, shots, or pipeline. Navigation only; no project data is changed.
